versions.title: Terms of Service
versions.content:
## Terms of Service

Welcome to **Yellow Dot**, an education network — seeded by EkStep Foundation — that connects learners with tutors, counsellors, and coaching centres.

### 1. Who can use Yellow Dot
Yellow Dot is currently **invite-only**. By continuing you confirm the information you provide is accurate. If you are a learner under 18, you should use the network with the involvement and consent of a parent or guardian.

### 2. What Yellow Dot is
Yellow Dot is a **discovery and matching network** that helps learners find educators and vice-versa. Educators and coaching centres listed on the network are **independent**; we are not a party to, and are not responsible for, any tuition, coaching, counselling, or outcome that results.

### 3. Your responsibilities
- Keep your profile accurate.
- Use the network lawfully and treat other participants with respect.
- Use any contact details you receive only for the purpose for which they were shared.

### 4. Suspension
We may pause or remove access for misuse or for activity that harms other participants.

### 5. Service "as is"
Yellow Dot is in active development and is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis, without warranties.

### 6. Governing law
These terms are governed by the laws of India. Questions or grievances: **hello@bluedotseconomy.org**.

versions.title: Privacy Policy
versions.content:
## Privacy Policy

This policy explains what **Yellow Dot** (seeded by EkStep Foundation) collects, why, and your choices.

### What we collect
- **Contact details** — your name, email, and phone number.
- **Learning information** you choose to provide — such as subjects, level, goals, and location (for learners), or subjects taught and experience (for tutors and centres).

### Why we use it
We use your information to **match learners with relevant tutors, counsellors, and coaching centres**, and to make your profile discoverable to relevant participants within the network.

### When your contact details are shared
Your name, email, and phone number are shared with another participant **only when you initiate or accept a connection**. **We never sell your data** and do not use it for advertising.

### Your control
You can **update** your profile from the portal at any time. To have your information removed, contact us at **hello@bluedotseconomy.org**.

### Retention
We keep your information only for as long as it is needed to connect learners and educators within the network.

### Grievances
For any privacy question or request, contact **hello@bluedotseconomy.org**.

versions.statement: The information collected will be used to match you with tutors, counsellors, and coaching centres. Tap "I agree to continue".
I agree to share my contact details (name, email, phone) with this learner / educator if they accept my request. The request may be cancelled at any time.
